---
title: 'Who Am I?'
date: '2015-05-08T04:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '2645649912494163087'
blogger_filename: '/p/about-bio.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="color: #333333; font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">What started this blog?</span></span></span></h4>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="color: #333333; font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><br /></span></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif; margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-disney-2013-round-icon-18aff4deb693.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-hat-disney-2013-round-icon-18aff4deb693.jpg" /></a></span></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><br /></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><br /></span></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span style="color: #333333; font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">My name is Darrell Wolfe. My family and I moved here, to Fort Worth Texas, like so many from southern California. We actually packed some&nbsp;duffel&nbsp;bags and hopped on the&nbsp;Amtrak&nbsp;Train with two kids. I did live in the north panhandle of&nbsp;Texas&nbsp;for a few years as a young child, and we felt called to come out, so we did.&nbsp;</span></span><br />
<div style="color: #333333; margin-bottom: 24px;">
</div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div style="color: #333333; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">However other than that brief stint I was born and raised in southern California. I lived in Riverside and Orange counties all of that time. I spent my whole life feeling like I was "from" Texas because of the few years I spent here as a young boy. I told everyone I was from Texas.</span></span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div style="color: #333333; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"><span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">Now that I live here it is painfully obviously I am a So Cal kid. I'm getting used to Texas life though and enjoying it. However I did have some trouble settling in and didn't find a whole lot of help on the Internet. Not as much as I would have expected. Californians have a website for everything. In Texas more than 50% of businesses still have no web presence.</span></span></span></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 24px;">
<span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #333333;">So I was sitting around with my lovely wife and talking about all the random blogs I wasn't working on anymore and the idea came to mind. "See a need, fill a need", from animated movie Robots. I have been asked by so many people who have moved here from other states: "Where is&nbsp;good place to eat?", "Who is a&nbsp;</span><b style="color: #333333;">good&nbsp;mechanic?"</b><span style="color: #333333;">, "How long do I have until I have to get a new&nbsp;License&nbsp;after moving here?", "How do I move my registration for my car?",&nbsp;etc, etc...&nbsp;</span></span><br />
<span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #333333;"><br /></span></span>
<span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;"><span style="color: #333333;">I've compiled an ever growing "<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/resources_6.html" target="_blank">Resources</a>" page with links to articles I've written in answer to these questions, as well as a links to other helpful sites and resources to help you Navigate LIFE in Fort Worth Texas.&nbsp;</span></span></div>
<span class="GCUXF0KCMK"><span class="GCUXF0KCD2B"></span></span><br />
<div style="color: #333333; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<div style="margin: 0px;">
<span style="font-family: Trebuchet MS, sans-serif;">This site will be part referral source, part relocation guide and assistance and a large part reviews. If you have moved here, are moving here, or thinking of moving here, I hope I can be of some assistance and help you transition smoother. I would <a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start HERE</a>.</span></div>
</div>
